fields.description:
# Re-home the CLAUDE.md-native ticket-model content into authoritative docs

## Why

Slimming the root guidance file (S2) requires the ticket-model content it currently owns to have
an authoritative home in `docs/` first, so nothing is lost when the root file becomes a set of
pointers. This story creates/extends the docs so every ticket-model topic is documented in `docs/`
independently of the root file.

## What

Produce the following documentation END STATE (this story is judged by what `docs/` contains
afterward, not by which source paragraph moved where):

- A new **`docs/ticket-model.md`** that documents, for agents, the four ticket-model concepts:
  the `idea` status lifecycle (dispatch/gate/`validate` semantics), hierarchy/containment
  (`parent_id`, not a link relation), linking (the six relations + the blocking-link promotion
  concept), and the tags surface (including the `--set-tags` add-wins convergence caveat). It
  cross-references `docs/event-schema.md` for the underlying event mechanics instead of restating
  event bodies (avoids drift).
- `docs/concurrency.md` (the I4a cascade section) additionally documents the cascade's **gate
  interaction**: a cascaded parent claim runs the parent's own plan-review claim gate; epics/
  stories are not gate-exempt; `--force` propagates up the cascade.
- `docs/event-schema.md` contains a dedicated `## The session_log ticket type` section describing
  the type semantics (gate/lifecycle-exempt, graph/health-excluded, non-blocking links only,
  never Jira-synced), and no longer defers those semantics to the root file.
- `docs/user-guide.md` documents the session-log **auto-rotation** behavior (the
  `.rebar/current_session_log` pointer + session fingerprint).
- `docs/README.md` indexes `docs/ticket-model.md`.

## Scope

In: `docs/ticket-model.md` (new) and `docs/{event-schema,concurrency,user-guide,README}.md`.
Out: editing the root guidance file (that is S2, which replaces these sections with pointers) and
any code change. Docs-only; rollback is a plain `git revert`.

## Design decisions (spike-validated)

A grounded docs read established that most ticket-model *mechanics* already live in
`docs/event-schema.md` (LINK/UNLINK, TAG_DELTA, CREATE genesis) and the cascade in
`docs/concurrency.md` I4a — only the `idea` status is wholly unhomed. So the new
`docs/ticket-model.md` carries the agent-facing *concept* with cross-refs, and the other docs get
three targeted gap-fills (the cascade gate nuance, a real session_log section, the auto-rotation
detail) rather than a bulk copy. Framing each criterion as an end-state the result must satisfy
keeps the plan verifiable by inspecting the produced docs.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `docs/ticket-model.md` exists and documents idea-status, hierarchy/containment, linking
  (relations + promotion), and the tags surface incl. `--set-tags`, with a cross-ref to
  `docs/event-schema.md` and no restated event bodies.
  - Proving: `test -f docs/ticket-model.md && [ "$(rg -c 'idea|parent_id|discovered_from|set-tags' docs/ticket-model.md)" -ge 4 ] && rg -q 'event-schema' docs/ticket-model.md`
- [ ] `docs/concurrency.md` documents the cascade's gate interaction (parent's own plan-review
  gate; epics/stories not gate-exempt; `--force`).
  - Proving (both strings are absent from concurrency.md today, so this fails until the section is added): `rg -q 'gate-exempt' docs/concurrency.md && rg -q 'plan-review' docs/concurrency.md`
- [ ] `docs/event-schema.md` has a `## The session_log ticket type` section and does not defer
  session_log semantics to the root file.
  - Proving: `rg -q '## The session_log ticket type' docs/event-schema.md`
- [ ] `docs/user-guide.md` documents session-log auto-rotation (currently absent).
  - Proving: `rg -q 'auto-rotat|current_session_log' docs/user-guide.md`
- [ ] `docs/README.md` indexes `docs/ticket-model.md`.
  - Proving: `rg -q 'ticket-model' docs/README.md`
- [ ] `make lint` passes.
  - Proving: `make lint`
